commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a diagnostic activity cleanup primitive, wires it into session reset and stuck-session recovery cleanup paths, and adds regression tests for stale tool activity removal.

PR surface: Source +137, Tests +114. Total +251 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main records native tool activity until a terminal event or run cleanup, while reset/recovery paths lack a diagnostic cleanup primitive for retired refs. I did not run a live gateway orphaned-process reproduction in this read-only review.
